name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, billing discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile billing data with project timesheets and email discrepancies to finance ops instead of manual reconciliation of billing and timesheet data.
problem_solved: Discrepancies between billing data and project timesheets
features: manual data entry for billing and timesheets

locked_fields.primary_problem: Discrepancies between billing data and project timesheets
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, billing discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile billing data with project timesheets and email discrepancies to finance ops instead of manual reconciliation of billing and timesheet data.

must_have_features: manual data entry for billing and timesheets
